greeting: Hi! 👋 Ask me about Salon Chrome's services, stylists, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, concise assistant for Salon Chrome, a beauty salon in Boise, Idaho specializing in hair services. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: Salon Chrome is open by appointment only — our lobby is currently closed and we're not offering walk-ins. Please schedule directly with your stylist in advance.
Prices vary by stylist — a haircut starts around $50, men's cuts around $30, and color services start at $75-$115+. Please contact your specific stylist for exact pricing.
We offer haircuts, men's cuts, full color application, root touch-ups, highlights, and tape-in or hand-tied extensions (by consultation with Eddiann).
You can reach Salon Chrome at (208) 861-0858, or leave your name and email here and we'll get back to you.
Salon Chrome is located at 7950 North Horseshoe Bend Road #102, Boise, Idaho 83714.

All appointments must be scheduled directly with your salon service provider in advance — we're not currently offering walk-ins. Let me know which stylist you'd like and I can help point you in the right direction.

We have several talented stylists on staff, including Jolene, Kim, and Eddiann. We also currently have three hair stations available for lease — contact Eddiann if you're a stylist interested in leasing a chair.
Of course — share your name and email and someone from Salon Chrome will follow up with you shortly.
